case_title: SMITH, ROGER R MD VS MELEYCO, KENNETH N

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MELEYCO, KENNETH N
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-23-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED; NOTICE MAILED TO PARTIES
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT KENNETH N. MELEYCO FILED. CHALLENGE OF VENUE ALREADY ON FILE 3/16/98.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, ROGER R MD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELEYCO, KENNETH N $1,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MELEYCO, KENNETH N
DEFT'S CHALLENGE OF VENUE IS DENIED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, ROGER R MD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELEYCO, KENNETH N $700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00, EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
